allow: Bash(node -e "try { const p = require\('./apps/mobile/node_modules/react-native-screens/package.json'\); console.log\('rn-screens:', p.version\); } catch\(e\) { try { const p = require\('./node_modules/react-native-screens/package.json'\); console.log\('rn-screens \(root\):', p.version\); } catch\(e2\) { console.log\('not found'\); } }")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./apps/mobile/node_modules/expo-router/package.json'\); console.log\('expo-router:', p.version\); const rn = require\('./apps/mobile/node_modules/react-native/package.json'\); console.log\('react-native:', rn.version\);")

Bash(node -e "const rn = require\('./node_modules/react-native/package.json'\); console.log\('react-native:', rn.version\); const expo = require\('./node_modules/expo/package.json'\); console.log\('expo:', expo.version\);")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/expo-router/package.json'\); console.log\('expo-router peer deps:', JSON.stringify\(p.peerDependencies, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./apps/mobile/node_modules/expo-router/package.json'\); console.log\('expo-router peer deps:', JSON.stringify\(p.peerDependencies || {}, null, 2\)\); console.log\('expo-router deps keys:', Object.keys\(p.dependencies || {}\).filter\(k => k.includes\('navigation'\) || k.includes\('screens'\) || k.includes\('safe'\)\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const libs = ['@react-navigation/native', '@react-navigation/native-stack', '@react-navigation/bottom-tabs', 'react-native-safe-area-context', 'react-native-reanimated', 'react-native-gesture-handler', 'react-native-screens']; libs.forEach\(l => { try { const p = require\(\\`./apps/mobile/node_modules/\\${l}/package.json\\`\); console.log\(l + ':', p.version\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(l + ': NOT in mobile/node_modules'\); } }\);")

Bash(node -e "const libs = ['@react-navigation/native', '@react-navigation/native-stack', '@react-navigation/bottom-tabs', 'react-native-safe-area-context', 'react-native-screens', 'react-native-reanimated', 'react-native-gesture-handler']; libs.forEach\(l => { try { const p = require\(\\`./\\${l}/package.json\\`\); console.log\(l + ':', p.version\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(l + ': NOT HERE'\); } }\);")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('rn-screens in expo deps:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('react-native-screens','not found'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('rn-screens:', d.get\('react-native-screens','not found'\)\)")
